title: Bethel Marthoma Church
tagline: Bethel Marthoma Church — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Bethel Marthoma Church is a Mar Thoma Syrian Church located at Chengara, Pathanamthitta, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Bethel Marthoma Church is a Mar Thoma Syrian Church located at Chengara, Pathanamthitta, Kerala, India. Bethel Marthoma Church belongs to the Ranni Nilackal Diocese of Mar Thoma Syrian Church. It is the biggest church in Chengara in terms of membership. Like all other Malankara Churches, St James liturgy is used in Bethel Marthoma Church for worship.

topPlaces.name: Chengara
topPlaces.description: Chengara is a small village located in the Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India. It is known for its natural environment, hills, and climate.

topPlaces.name: Thannithode
topPlaces.description: Thannithode is a village in Pathanamthitta district in the state of Kerala, India. It is near Konni town and is mainly a plantation township.

topPlaces.name: Malayalappuzha
topPlaces.description: Malayalapuzha is a village outside the city suburbs of Pathanamthitta in Kerala. It is seven kilometers away from Pathanamthitta central junction and five kilometers from Kumbazha junction.

topPlaces.name: Muringamangalam Sreemahadevar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Muringamangalam Sreemahadevar Temple, located half a kilometre from Konni Junction, is more than 1000 years old. It used to belong to the Pandalam Royal Family.

topPlaces.name: Konni, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Konni is a Grama Panchayat and Taluk headquarters in Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India. Konni is known for its elephant cages, forests, and rubber plantations.

topPlaces.name: Mount Bethany EHSS
topPlaces.description: Mount Bethany English Medium Higher Secondary School is a school in Kerala, India. The school began providing education to lower primary level classes in the late 1970s.

topPlaces.name: Maniyar, Pathanamthitta
topPlaces.description: Maniyar is a small town in Pathanamthitta district, in Kerala state, India. Maniyar is located on the Pathanamthitta - Seethathodu Road.

topPlaces.name: Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy
topPlaces.description: Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzy is one of the oldest temples in Pathanamthitta, South India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bethel Marthoma Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bethel Marthoma Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bethel Marthoma Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (88 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bethel Marthoma Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bethel Marthoma Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bethel Marthoma Church?
faq.a: Stays in Bethel Marthoma Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bethel Marthoma Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chengara, Thannithode, Malayalappuzha, Muringamangalam Sreemahadevar Temple, Konni, Kerala.
